# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- In `Species.Client`, each file should contain only a single class or entity, and enums should live under the `Enums` folder.
- Prefer the current top-level `Species.Client` structure (`ViewModels`, `ViewModelFactories`, `Renderers`, `Presentation`, etc.); avoid reorganizing into screen-based folders and preserve existing UI behavior during refactors.
